title: Stop Losing Your Best Staff: How Automated Commission Tracking Keeps Your Mobile Shop Team Motivated

excerpt: High staff turnover is killing mobile shop profits across India. Learn how MobiBix's automatic commission ledger calculates, tracks, and pays out staff earnings on every sale — keeping your team motivated and your shop growing.

mobile shop billing software with commission

content:
## The Real Reason Your Best Staff Leave

You trained them. You trusted them with your customers. And then one day, they walked across the street to your competitor — who promised them "better pay."

In mobile retail and repair across India, staff attrition is one of the **most underrated profit killers**. Every time a good salesperson leaves, you lose:

- Their product knowledge
- Their customer relationships
- 2–3 months of productivity training their replacement
- And sometimes, they take loyal customers with them

The fix isn't always about paying more. It's about **paying transparently and on time**. Staff who can see exactly what they've earned — per sale, per invoice — don't feel cheated. They feel motivated.

That's exactly what **MobiBix Staff Commission Ledger** does.

---

## What Is a Commission Ledger for Mobile Shops?

A commission ledger is a real-time record of how much each staff member has earned through sales commissions. Instead of doing it manually on a notebook or guessing at the end of the month, MobiBix automatically:

1. **Detects every new sale** (invoice created)
2. **Matches it to your commission rules**
3. **Calculates the earned amount** per invoice line item
4. **Records it in the staff's earning ledger**
5. **Lets you mark it paid** when you process payroll

No spreadsheets. No disputes. No "sir, you forgot to count my Samsung sale from last Tuesday."

---

## Three Commission Models That Match Your Business

Every mobile shop is different. MobiBix supports three powerful commission structures:

### 1. Percentage of Sale
The most common model. Set a flat percentage (e.g., 2%) on every rupee sold.

> **Example:** Staff sells a ₹32,000 Samsung S24. At 2% of sale → earns ₹640 on that invoice.

**Best for:** Shops that want a simple, easy-to-understand system for all staff.

### 2. Percentage of Profit
Reward staff based on the *margin* they generate, not just the top line. This stops the bad habit of giving unnecessary discounts.

> **Example:** Phone sold at ₹32,000, cost ₹28,000 → profit ₹4,000. At 10% of profit → earns ₹400.

**Best for:** Shops where discounting is a problem, or where you want staff to focus on high-margin products.

### 3. Fixed Amount Per Item
Perfect for accessories and services. Pay a fixed rupee amount per unit sold, regardless of price.

> **Example:** Every mobile cover sold earns the staff ₹20. Sells 15 covers today → earns ₹300.

**Best for:** Accessories, repair services, spare parts — items where margins are fixed and predictable.

---

## Intelligent Targeting: Who Gets the Commission?

Not every rule should apply to every person. MobiBix lets you target your rules with three scopes:

| Scope | How It Works |
|-------|--------------|
| **All Staff** | Every person who creates a sale earns this commission |
| **Specific Role** | Only Technicians, or only Supervisors, or only a custom role |
| **Specific Staff Member** | Personal bonus rule for your top salesperson |

You can also add a **product category filter** — so a rule only fires on "MOBILE" sales, or only on "ACCESSORIES," or only on "REPAIR" services.

This means you can set up a system like:
- All staff: 2% on everything
- Senior sales role: extra 3% on flagship mobiles
- Specific star performer: personal 5% bonus on premium phones

---

## How the Automation Works

The moment a sale is confirmed in MobiBix, the commission engine fires automatically:

```
Invoice Created
    ↓
System checks active commission rules for your shop
    ↓
For each matching rule + invoice item:
    → Calculate saleAmount, profitAmount
    → Apply commission formula
    → Record in staff earning ledger (status: PENDING)
    ↓
Owner reviews ledger → clicks "Mark as Paid"
    ↓
Earning status = PAID, timestamp recorded
```

The best part: **it never blocks a sale**. Even if the commission calculation has an unexpected edge case, the invoice goes through. Your billing is never interrupted.

---

## The Commission Dashboard: Visibility for Everyone

In the **Staff Management → Commission** section you'll find:

### For Owners/Managers
- Full earnings ledger across all staff
- Filter by staff member, status (Pending/Paid), date range
- Bulk select multiple entries → "Mark as Paid" in one click
- See total pending payouts at a glance

### For Staff
- Coming in next update: personal earnings view per staff login

---

## Real Business Impact: A Case Study

Rajesh runs a 3-staff mobile shop in Coimbatore. Before commission tracking:

- Month-end was a war: "I sold more than him, why is my bonus the same?"
- Two good staff quit in 6 months
- Rajesh was manually calculating commissions in a notebook — taking 3 hours every month

After setting up MobiBix Commission Ledger:

- Commissions are visible in real-time after every sale
- Disputes dropped to zero — "the system shows it, no argument"
- Staff turnover reduced — people could see their earnings growing with every sale
- Rajesh gets his month-end done in 5 minutes

---

## Setting Up Your First Commission Rule (3 Minutes)

1. Go to **Staff Management** → **Commission** tab
2. Click **+ New Rule**
3. Choose your shop, give the rule a name (e.g., "All Sales 2%")
4. Set: Scope = All Staff, Type = Percentage of Sale, Value = 2
5. Click **Save**

From the next invoice onwards, every sale automatically generates an earning entry. That's it.

---
